items.title: This Acer 27-inch Mini LED gaming monitor lets you pick between 4K 160Hz and FHD 320Hz, and it’s down to $350 all-time low
items.summary:
We are now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops a 27-inch Acer Nitro Mini LED dual-mode gaming monitor down to $349.99 shipped. This is originally a $500 unit that has fetched as much as $430 in recent months at Amazon. Today’s deal takes $80 off that price to land it $30 below the previous all-time low it hit during the holiday sale last year. We’ve previously seen a variant of this monitor with a standard IPS panel go for less, but this is the lowest price we have tracked for this version with a Mini LED. It’s a pretty good option to pick if you’re looking to buy a new gaming monitor for your battlestation, and you can learn more about it in detail below.

items.title: Just $9 gets you this Baseus USB-C cable with LED display that monitors power output in real-time (53% off)
items.summary:
Baseus 100W 6.6-foot USB-C cable with LED

Buy for $9 (Reg. $19)

Apply BN4Z68VV during checkout.

What we love

One of the key highlights of this Baseus USB-C cable, as you can tell, is the integrated LED panel built into the connector, which lets you monitor charging power in real time. The 6.6-foot braided cable supports up to 100W fast charging and offers data transfer speeds of up to 480Mbps, making it a practical option for both charging and syncing devices.
